summary: Bug fix verification complete. Both issues resolved: 1) Video preview shows user-friendly fallback for expired blob URLs instead of infinite loading, 2) Audio preview layout corrected - companion banner displays first (on top), audio player below.
critical_code_review_comments: Video preview onError handler correctly hides video element and shows fallback div
Video fallback shows meaningful messages: 'Video unavailable', 'The video file session has expired', 'Re-upload the video to preview'
Audio preview layout correctly renders companion banner section BEFORE audio player section (line 351-369 before line 371-415)
Audio fallback also handles session expiry with user-friendly message
Both previews display dimensions and duration badges correctly
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing creatives with expired blob URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video and Audio preview fallback fixes verified. Video shows fallback for expired blob URLs with onError handler. Audio preview displays companion banner first, then audio player below. Both show session expiry messages.

video_fallback_for_expired_blob.description: Video preview shows fallback instead of infinite loading when blob URL expires
video_fallback_for_expired_blob.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Video unavailable', 'The video file session has expired', 'Re-upload the video to preview' messages

audio_layout_order.description: Audio preview shows companion banner FIRST (on top), audio player BELOW
audio_layout_order.evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Companion Banner (300x250)' appears above 'Audio Preview (42s)' section

audio_companion_dimensions.description: Audio preview shows companion banner dimensions
audio_companion_dimensions.evidence: Text showing 'Companion Banner (300x250)' visible in preview

audio_duration.evidence: Text showing 'Audio Preview (42s)' visible in preview

audio_fallback_for_expired_blob.description: Audio preview shows fallback when audio blob URL expires
audio_fallback_for_expired_blob.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Audio file unavailable (session expired)' and 'Re-upload the audio file to preview' messages
